Georgia, Times New Roman, serif
Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
text.tspan: A calm, privacy-first tool that turns scattered evidence into a
Portable Human Portfolio, compares credible futures, and helps
activate one next step without diagnosis or fixed identity labels.

text.font-family: Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
text.tspan: Help a person read what already exists, simulate better life and work
directions, and translate one credible scenario into practical
movement.

text.font-family: Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
Georgia, Times New Roman, serif
Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
text.tspan: - Skills, values, interests, feedback, story, wellbeing, constraints
- Local evidence intake from notes and attachments
- Output: Portable Human Portfolio and a provisional WHY

text.font-family: Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
Georgia, Times New Roman, serif
Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
text.tspan: - Translate the portfolio into ESCO / O*NET terminology
- Compare hypotheses through Ikigai, PERMAV, and wellbeing thresholds
- Output: decision-ready scenarios before any opportunity appears

text.font-family: Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
Georgia, Times New Roman, serif
Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Turn one scenario into a workable life system.

text.font-family: Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
text.tspan: - Learning paths, portfolio projects, mentorship, networking
- Sleep, nutrition, movement, sport, recovery, financial guardrails
- Lead experiment, stop criteria, and progressive life or work choices

text.font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif
Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
text.tspan: Simulation translates the portfolio into
shared ESCO and O*NET language before
Activation surfaces any next move.

text.font-family: Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
text.tspan: A dummy agent reuses local attachments, CVs,
profile exports, and wellbeing traces
as cautious intake hypotheses.

text.font-family: Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
text.tspan: Opportunities, routines, wellbeing habits,
learning paths, and experiments stay in
Phase 3 so action follows reflection.

text.font-family: Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
text.tspan: No diagnosis. No fixed labels. No public cloud.
Every output stays a signal, pattern, or
hypothesis to validate.
